ogTitle: Ferntree Gully vs Ferny Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ferntree Gully and Ferny Creek.
heading: Ferntree Gully vs Ferny Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ferntree Gully, Victoria and Ferny Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ferny Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Ferntree Gully (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ferntree Gully or Ferny Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ferntree Gully has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Ferny Creek scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ferntree Gully scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Ferny Creek scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ferntree Gully or Ferny Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ferny Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
